sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace Announces New Executive Leadership Member
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. has appointed Jonathan Arena as its new Executive Vice President, Chief Legal and Compliance Officer, and Secretary. Mr. Arena, who previously held senior legal roles at Huntington Ingalls Industries, The Boeing Company, and NASA, will also join the company's Executive Leadership Team. He will be based at Howmet's global headquarters in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.

feed.title: Gartner Shareholders Urged to Join Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP is urging Gartner (NYSE: IT) shareholders who purchased stock between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, to join a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges Gartner made false statements about its ability to meet consulting revenue targets and maintain its contract value growth rate, leading to significant stock price declines. The deadline for investors to file as lead plaintiff is May 18, 2026.

feed.title: Caisse pursuing European logistics market with joint venture, backing technology company funding plan
feed.summary: The Caisse de dépôt et placement du Québec (Caisse) is establishing a new joint venture with Prologis Inc. to invest in the European logistics sector, starting with nearly $1.6 billion in assets. The Caisse will hold a 70% ownership interest in this venture, with Prologis as the operating partner. Additionally, Caisse is committing A$1 billion to Nextdc Ltd.'s A$1 billion wholesale offer of subordinated hybrid securities to support the data center provider's growth and strategic initiatives in Australia.

feed.title: PRU Maintained by Mizuho -- Price Target Lowered to $101
feed.summary: Mizuho analyst Yaron Kinar maintained a Neutral rating on Prudential Financial (PRU) but lowered the price target from $113.00 to $101.00. Despite this, GuruFocus indicates PRU is 9.3% undervalued with a GF Value™ of $107.48 against a current price of $97.53, and has a GF Score™ of 68/100, driven by strong profitability and valuation but low growth. Insider activity shows recent buys but no sales, suggesting insider confidence.

feed.title: B. Riley Financial Issues Positive Forecast for Applied Materials Stock Price
feed.summary: B. Riley Financial has increased its price target for Applied Materials (AMAT) stock from $450.00 to $485.00, maintaining a 'buy' rating. This positive forecast, issued on April 13, 2026, signals continued strength in the semiconductor market and optimism for Applied Materials' growth. The analysts cited the company's strong market position and technological leadership as key reasons for the raised target.

feed.title: Uber and Alliance for HOPE International Expand "Hope Rides" Program to Florida
feed.summary: Uber and Alliance for HOPE International are expanding their "Hope Rides" program to Florida. This initiative provides free, safe transportation for victims of domestic violence, sexual assault, and human trafficking to access critical resources and services. The expansion aims to address transportation barriers that often prevent survivors from escaping abusive situations and seeking help.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics (STLD) director granted 16 dividend-equivalent shares
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics director Jennifer L. Hamann was granted 16 shares of common stock as a dividend-equivalent award linked to deferred stock units under the company's 2023 Equity Incentive Plan and Dividend Reinvestment Plan. The shares were awarded at $0.00 per share, and after this transaction, Hamann directly holds 4,495 shares of Steel Dynamics common stock. This transaction is exempt from certain Section 16 reporting requirements due to its nature as a dividend reinvestment feature of the plan.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics (STLD) director adds 12 shares via DSU dividend
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (STLD) director Luis Manuel Sierra acquired 12 additional shares of common stock through a dividend-equivalent deferred stock unit (DSU) grant. This transaction, tied to the company's 2023 Equity Incentive Plan and Dividend Reinvestment Plan, increased Sierra's direct holdings to 10,804 shares. The DSUs are payable solely in common stock and are exempt from certain Section 16 reporting rules.

feed.title: Director at Lennox (NYSE: LII) receives 51-share stock retainer
feed.summary: Lennox International director Somasundaram Sivasankaran received 51 shares of common stock as a quarterly retainer, valued at $505.31 per share. This grant increased his direct holdings to 767 shares of Lennox International. The transaction was reported in a Form 4 and is classified as a grant or award acquisition, not an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ: STLD) director granted 5 dividend-equivalent shares
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics Inc. director Kenneth W. Cornew was granted 5 shares of common stock as a dividend-equivalent award tied to deferred stock units under the company's 2023 Equity Incentive Plan. Following this transaction, his direct holdings increased to 36,299 shares of common stock. This grant, valued at $0.00 per share, is considered a compensation-related acquisition and is exempt from certain SEC reporting requirements.

feed.title: Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) Price Target Lowered to $101.00 at Mizuho
feed.summary: Mizuho has lowered its price target for Prudential Financial (NYSE:PRU) from $113.00 to $101.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This adjustment reflects a broader trend among several other brokerage firms which have also trimmed their price targets and ratings, leading to a consensus "Reduce" rating for PRU with an average target of $108.44. The stock recently traded at $97.83 after reporting quarterly EPS of $3.30, missing estimates by $0.07, though insiders have made notable purchases.

feed.title: APO Investor Alert: APOLLO GLOBAL MANAGEMENT, INC.
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has issued an investor alert for Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO), initiating a securities fraud lawsuit. Institutional investors who held APO shares between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026, are encouraged to evaluate lead plaintiff opportunities due to alleged undisclosed business communications between senior leadership and Jeffrey Epstein. The firm highlights that shares declined by approximately $5.99 after corrective disclosures, and the deadline to apply for lead plaintiff is May 1, 2026.

feed.title: Georgiades reports indirect stake in Pineapple Financial (PAPL) via LLC
feed.summary: Pineapple Financial Inc. director Anthony Georgiades has filed an initial Form 3, reporting an indirect holding of 1,315,789 common shares through Innovating Capital GP, LLC. Georgiades possesses investment and dispositive power over these shares but disclaims beneficial ownership, except for any pecuniary interest. The filing documents an existing indirect ownership position rather than a new transaction.

feed.title: Expedia Hotelbuchung: Between AI Tools and Market Slowdown, Recovery Hinges on Travel Boom
feed.summary: The article discusses Expedia's "Hotelbuchung" tool, highlighting its role in bundling flights and hotels for cost savings, especially for U.S. travelers. It explains how this feature and Expedia's broader strategy, supported by AI and direct-to-consumer channels, position the company for growth amid post-pandemic travel rebounds and intense market competition. The piece also covers potential risks, analyst outlooks, and key indicators investors should monitor regarding Expedia Group's stock performance.

feed.title: Traders Buy High Volume of Charles Schwab Put Options (NYSE:SCHW)
feed.summary: Traders showed significant bearish sentiment towards Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) by purchasing 32,819 put options, a 62% increase over typical volume. This occurs despite the company's "Moderate Buy" analyst consensus, recent EPS beat, and increased dividend. However, substantial insider selling totaling $42.4 million in the last 90 days may be a contributing factor to the increased put activity.

feed.title: Bank of America, Wells Fargo and Truist to report Q1 earnings amid market volatility, geopolitical pressure
feed.summary: Bank of America, Wells Fargo, and Truist are scheduled to release their Q1 earnings reports soon amidst market volatility and geopolitical pressures. Wells Fargo will report on April 14, Bank of America on April 15, and Truist on April 17. Analysts will be focusing on net interest income and loan quality from these major financial institutions.

feed.title: Goldman CEO Solomon sees private credit as attractive sector, despite retail concerns
feed.summary: David Solomon, CEO of Goldman Sachs, continues to view private credit as an attractive sector, despite concerns from retail investors. This perspective comes as retail investors are reportedly pulling back from private credit, creating opportunities for institutional investors like CalSTRS. The article also touches on broader industry trends including earnings season for asset managers and the impact of the Iran war on markets.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group Lowers Danaher (NYSE:DHR) Price Target to $230.00
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has reduced its price target for Danaher (NYSE:DHR) from $265.00 to $230.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating an 18.26% potential upside. Despite the lowered target, analyst consensus remains positive with a "Moderate Buy" rating and an average target of $249.60. Danaher recently surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue estimates and is trading near $194.49 with a market cap of approximately $137.6 billion.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Cuts MTY Food Group (TSE:MTY) Price Target to C$45.00
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has lowered its price target for MTY Food Group (TSE:MTY) from C$46.00 to C$45.00, maintaining a "market perform" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 19.05% from the stock's current price of C$37.80. The consensus rating among analysts is "Hold" with an average price target of C$46.00, based on recent reports from various financial institutions.

feed.title: Why Oracle Shares Are Trading Higher On Monday?
feed.summary: Oracle (NYSE: ORCL) shares are trading higher due to dip-buying, a reassessment of valuation concerns, and the positive impact of new Oracle Aconex features on construction project management. The company also announced strong Q1 2026 earnings estimates, projecting significant year-over-year growth in EPS and revenue, further supported by a "Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $249.26. Oracle's substantial weight in key technology ETFs means its stock price is also influenced by broader market movements in these funds.

feed.title: EG Maintained by Everest Group -- Price Target Raised to $365
feed.summary: Mizuho analyst Yaron Kinar raised the price target for Everest Group Ltd (EG) to $365, up from $360, while maintaining a Neutral rating. Despite this, GuruFocus assesses EG as 19.5% undervalued with a GF Value™ of $413.06 and a strong GF Score™ of 78/100, highlighting good profitability and growth but low momentum. Insiders have shown no recent buying or selling activity.

feed.title: Progyny Inc stock (US74340E1038): Is fertility benefits demand strong enough to drive sustained grow
feed.summary: Progyny Inc. (US74340E1038) is positioned as a key player in the growing U.S. fertility benefits market, providing an employer-sponsored platform that covers a range of fertility and family-building services. The company's model emphasizes high-touch support, data analytics for optimized outcomes, and partnerships with top clinics, creating predictable cash flows tied to employment trends. With strong retention rates and a focus on specialized services, analysts maintain a positive outlook for Progyny despite potential risks from regulatory changes or intensified competition.

feed.title: Dollar General owes you money and today is the deadline
feed.summary: Today is the final day for eligible customers to claim their share of an $8.5 million cash settlement from Dollar General, following accusations of charging customers higher prices at the register than advertised on shelves. Consumers who purchased merchandise at Dollar General stores nationwide between October 10, 2016, and November 19, 2025, may qualify for cash payouts or an in-store discount. Claims must be submitted via DGPriceSettlement.com by the end of today, April 13, 2026.

feed.title: Conagra Brands falls as investors digest incoming CEO announcement
feed.summary: Conagra Brands (CAG) stock dropped 4.8% following the announcement of a leadership transition. John Brase will take over as President and CEO from Sean Connolly, effective June 1, 2026, creating investor uncertainty despite Brase's deep packaged-food experience. The article also details recent insider trading, hedge fund activity, government contracts, congressional stock trading, and analyst ratings for CAG.

feed.title: Why Jim Cramer Stands by Defense Sector and 5 Stock Calls
feed.summary: Jim Cramer continues to advocate for investing in the defense sector, highlighting L3Harris Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:LHX) as a key player. He emphasized L3Harris's growth through acquisitions, particularly Aerojet Rocketdyne, which he believes is crucial for rebuilding missile stockpiles. The company is noted for its diverse defense offerings, including communication systems, space technology, electronic warfare, and counter-drone products.

feed.title: Salesforce, Inc. stock (US79466L3024): Is AI innovation strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: This article examines whether Salesforce's significant push into AI, particularly with its Agentforce platform and Data Cloud, can fuel its next phase of growth and justify its premium valuation. It highlights Salesforce's dominant position in the CRM market, its recurring revenue model, and its strategic priorities including AI ubiquity, international expansion, and efficiency. The piece also discusses analyst views, risks like macroeconomic sensitivity and competition, and what investors should monitor next.

feed.title: LAWSUIT DEADLINE: Investors who lost over $100,000 with Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) with purchases between April 2024 and March 2026 should contact the Shareholders Foundation
feed.summary: The Shareholders Foundation announced a lawsuit deadline of May 26, 2026, for investors who incurred losses exceeding $100,000 from purchasing Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) shares between April 30, 2024, and March 19, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Super Micro Computer failed to disclose that a significant portion of its server sales to Chinese companies violated U.S. export control laws and that there were material weaknesses in the company's compliance controls. Investors affected by these alleged securities law violations are encouraged to contact the Shareholders Foundation.

feed.title: JPMorgan Financial (AMJB) prices $1.297M auto‑call structured notes linked to MerQube Index
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC has priced $1.297 million in Auto Callable Contingent Interest Notes, linked to the MerQube US Large-Cap Vol Advantage Index. The notes, expected to settle around April 14, 2026, offer a contingent interest rate of 17.15% per annum if the index is at or above 70.00% of its initial value, and may be automatically called starting April 9, 2027. Investors face a principal loss if the final value is below 50% of the initial value, and the index is subject to a 6.0% per annum daily deduction influencing its performance and the notes' economic terms.

feed.title: A Look At Vulcan Materials (VMC) Valuation As Earnings Near And Infrastructure Demand Builds
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials (VMC) is approaching its Q1 2026 earnings release, with investor focus on potential profit growth driven by infrastructure and data center demand. While recent share price momentum is positive, the stock is trading below the average analyst target and its intrinsic value, with one narrative suggesting it's 9.8% undervalued due to its market position in growing urban areas. However, its high P/E ratio compared to industry peers suggests it might be expensive, leading to mixed sentiment on its valuation.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) Valuation Check As New PRECISE Collaboration Targets Long Term Precision Medicine Growth
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) recently announced a collaboration with Precision Health Research, Singapore for the PRECISE-SG100K biobank, aiming to advance precision medicine. Despite a mixed stock performance with a recent gain but year-to-date decline, analysts value the stock at a higher target price than its current trading price. The article discusses two valuation narratives: one suggesting it's undervalued based on long-term demand, and another flagging caution due to its P/E ratio.

feed.title: SMBC nears lease for 200,000 square feet in uptown to house 2,000-job financial hub: sources
feed.summary: Global banking giant Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corp. (SMBC) is reportedly nearing a lease agreement for approximately 200,000 square feet in the former One Wells Fargo Center in uptown Charlotte. This move is expected to house a 2,000-job financial hub, fulfilling plans announced previously for a major financial services center in the city. SMBC's decision comes after selecting Charlotte over Jacksonville for its new hub.

feed.title: Raymond James Maintains Hewlett Packard Enterprise(HPE.US) With Buy Rating, Cuts Target Price to $29
feed.summary: Raymond James has reiterated its Buy rating on Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE.US) but has adjusted its price target downwards to $29. This revision suggests a continued positive outlook on the company despite the lower price target.

feed.title: Williams Sonoma Launches Collaboration With Oakville Grocery
feed.summary: Williams Sonoma has announced a new collaboration with Oakville Grocery, an iconic Napa Valley grocery store and wine merchant. This partnership brings together two Northern California brands to offer a collection of gourmet food and pantry staples, celebrating the flavors and ingredients of Napa and Sonoma Valleys. The collection is now available at Williams Sonoma stores and online, with in-store sampling events planned for April 17th and 18th.

feed.title: Unusual Whales Subversive Democratic Trading ETF (NANC) company profile and facts
feed.summary: This article provides a company profile and key facts for the Unusual Whales Subversive Democratic Trading ETF (NANC). The actively managed ETF invests in equity securities of publicly-traded companies that sitting Democratic members of the U.S. Congress, and/or their family members, have reported investing in through public disclosure filings. It details the ETF's objective, overview, operational attributes, and related tickers, noting it is non-diversified.

feed.title: What would a Sysco purchase of Restaurant Depot mean for Pittsburgh restaurants?
feed.summary: The article discusses the potential implications for Pittsburgh restaurants if Sysco were to acquire Restaurant Depot. It explores what such a purchase could mean for local businesses in terms of supply, pricing, and competition within the food service industry.

feed.title: How to apply for jobs at Pensacola Costco starting at $20 an hour
feed.summary: Costco is hiring for its new Pensacola wholesale warehouse store, which is nearing completion. The company is looking to fill 47 positions with pay ranging from $20 to $33 per hour for most roles. Interested applicants can apply online at careers.costco.com/jobs and filter by city.

feed.title: AXP Flies 22.8% in a Year: How Far Can the Price Rally Go?
feed.summary: American Express (AXP) has outperformed many of its peers, gaining 22.8% over the past year due to its focus on premium customers and a closed-loop network providing richer data insights. Despite trading at a premium valuation compared to the industry average, AXP is seen to have significant upside potential driven by its robust business model, shareholder-friendly moves, and efforts to attract younger demographics and leverage AI. However, rising costs and elevated debt levels warrant monitoring.

feed.title: Oracle, Intel among market cap stock movers on Monday
feed.summary: Oracle and Intel shares are rallying while Goldman Sachs stock is falling, among other significant market cap movers. The article highlights changes in mega-cap, large-cap, mid-cap, and small-cap stocks driven by various news and factors. This information is intended for investors watching market trends.

feed.title: Conagra Brands (CAG) Falls 5.4% Amid Rising Oil Prices Concerns
feed.summary: Conagra Brands (CAG) saw its stock fall by 5.4%, influenced by a broader downturn in food and beverage stocks due to rising oil prices expected to increase operational costs. The company, which has a moderate GF Score™ of 61/100, also has a current ratio of 0.9, indicating potential liquidity concerns. Its P/E ratio is currently 0, suggesting it may not be generating positive earnings, and its stock price is near its 52-week low.

feed.title: Amazon Expands Auto Marketplace With New Brands
feed.summary: Amazon is expanding its Amazon Autos platform by adding several major car brands like Jeep, Chevrolet, Kia, Mazda, and Subaru, moving beyond its initial offering with Hyundai. This expansion aims to simplify the car-buying process, making it more akin to other online purchases, with Amazon handling the digital experience and local dealerships managing pricing and final delivery. For investors, this signifies Amazon's continued diversification into high-value markets beyond its core retail business.

feed.title: DaVita Inc stock (US23804L1035): Why its kidney care dominance matters more now for investors
feed.summary: DaVita Inc. (US23804L1035) is a major player in the U.S. dialysis market, operating over 2,600 outpatient centers and treating more than 250,000 patients annually. The company's dominance in kidney care is increasingly important for investors due to demographic tailwinds like the growing end-stage renal disease population, its integrated care model, efficient operations, and strategic expansions into higher-margin services. Despite regulatory and competitive pressures, DaVita's strong cash flow, physician partnerships, and technology investments position it for stable long-term growth.

feed.title: BofA Names Top Consumer Staples Stocks Ahead of Earnings Season
feed.summary: Bank of America has identified six consumer staples stocks as top picks in anticipation of the first-quarter earnings season. Coca-Cola leads the list, with other selections including Vita Coco, Mondelez, Smithfield Foods, Colgate-Palmolive, and Church & Dwight. Analysts highlighted specific catalysts and earnings expectations for each company, noting potential World Cup benefits for Coca-Cola and strong sales growth potential for Vita Coco.

feed.title: GE HealthCare integrates ultrasound into Medtronic’s Stealth AXiS surgical system
feed.summary: GE HealthCare has announced the commercial availability of its bkActiv intraoperative ultrasound technology integrated with Medtronic's Stealth AXiS surgical navigation system. This integration provides surgeons with real-time ultrasound images to assess mid-procedure anatomy changes, such as "brain shift," which can impact surgical plans. The Stealth AXiS system, cleared by the FDA for various procedures, builds on a long-standing partnership between GE HealthCare and Medtronic to enhance surgical accuracy and workflow.

feed.title: Lake County pursues redevelopment plan for shuttered Kroger facility
feed.summary: Lake County is quickly working on a redevelopment plan for the former Kroger facility in Groveland after its closure resulted in the loss of over 1,000 jobs. The article, published by the Orlando Business Journal, highlights the county's efforts to find a new future for the site.

feed.title: Why Edison International Stock Keeps Sinking Today
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) stock is declining due to investors selling off utility stocks, driven by a surge in Treasury yields and oil prices exceeding $100 after U.S.-Iran talks failed. The company is also facing continued pressure from wildfire-related legal risks and recent analyst downgrades that suggest a further 17% potential decline.

feed.title: Why is Global Payments stock up today?
feed.summary: Global Payments Inc. (GPN) saw its stock rise 3.77% today, trading at $67.91, despite remaining in a bearish trend according to both short- and long-term moving averages. Analysts from Traders Union offer contrasting views: Anton Kharitonov sees the bounce as temporary and a selling opportunity due to persistent bearish signals, while Viktoras Karapetjanc views the intraday strength and oversold conditions as potential entry points for investors. The technical outlook remains mixed with strong sell signals from MACD but signs of diminishing downward pressure, requiring close monitoring for decisive price moves.

feed.title: Raytheon tests event-based infrared camera for tracking fast-moving targets (RTX:NYSE)
feed.summary: Raytheon, a business of RTX, has successfully demonstrated a new mid-wave infrared camera designed for real-time tracking of high-speed objects. The technology aims to reduce data processing and power requirements compared to conventional infrared systems. This advancement could be significant for defense and aerospace applications.

feed.title: Rubbermaid Vorratsdosen: Amid Supply Chain Shifts, Everyday Storage Gets Strategic Edge
feed.summary: This article examines how Rubbermaid Vorratsdosen (food storage containers) are positioned within Newell Brands' strategy of focusing on resilient home goods, especially as supply chains stabilize. It highlights the product's practicality, durability, and alignment with sustainable living, making it a reliable choice for consumers. For investors, the article discusses Newell Brands' strategic optimization, noting that Rubbermaid's steady sales contribute to the home segment's stability, making it a stock to watch in the consumer discretionary space.

feed.title: Chromatograph (Labor): Precision Tools Drive Agilent's Lab Market Edge Amid Tech Boom
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies' chromatographs are critical precision tools for laboratory analysis in pharmaceuticals, environmental testing, and biotech, supporting high-stakes research. The company's strategic focus on innovation, sustainability, and recurring revenue from consumables positions it as a key player in the growing analytical instruments market. Despite challenges such as supply chain disruptions and competition, Agilent maintains a strong market position, driven by increasing lab automation and research funding globally.

feed.title: B. Riley Financial Boosts Onto Innovation (NYSE:ONTO) Price Target to $310.00
feed.summary: B. Riley Financial has increased its price target for Onto Innovation (NYSE:ONTO) to $310.00 from $275.00, maintaining a "buy" rating with an implied upside of 22.96%. Other analysts have also adjusted their targets, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $260.00. The semiconductor company recently reported Q1 earnings per share of $1.26, missing estimates by $0.02, on revenue of $266.9 million, which was up 1.1% year-over-year.
